# Shartaz Feeham (Feeham)

This site is the portfolio of Shartaz Feeham (also known as "Feeham"), a backend-focused software engineer.

## Canonical URL
- https://feeham.com/

## Profiles
- GitHub: https://github.com/ShartazFeeham
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/shartaz-feeham

## Summary
Shartaz Feeham (Feeham) specializes in building scalable distributed systems using Java and the Spring Boot ecosystem, with experience in microservices, Kafka, Docker, and PostgreSQL.

## Contact
- Email: mdfeeham@gmail.com
